payload.last_assistant_message:
The pre-tool-use hook is blocking any command with `rm` in it. I'll need you to run this manually. 

Can you run this command in your terminal (type `!` followed by the command):

```
! git rm --cached .specify/memory/constitution.md specs/MWPW-190803/checklists/requirements.md specs/MWPW-190803/contracts/settings-transformer.md specs/MWPW-190803/data-model.md specs/MWPW-190803/plan.md specs/MWPW-190803/research.md specs/MWPW-190803/spec.md specs/MWPW-190803/tasks.md
```

This only removes files from git tracking — they stay on disk. After that I'll complete the merge commit.

The files show no changes — the `!` command may not have run from the repo root. Could you try again from the repo root:

```
! cd /Users/axelcurenobasurto/Web/mas && git rm --cached .specify/memory/constitution.md specs/MWPW-190803/checklists/requirements.md specs/MWPW-190803/contracts/settings-transformer.md specs/MWPW-190803/data-model.md specs/MWPW-190803/plan.md specs/MWPW-190803/research.md specs/MWPW-190803/spec.md specs/MWPW-190803/tasks.md
```

Some are still tracked — the checklists and .specify ones were removed but not the rest. Could you run this for the remaining files:

```
! cd /Users/axelcurenobasurto/Web/mas && git rm --cached specs/MWPW-190803/contracts/settings-transformer.md specs/MWPW-190803/data-model.md specs/MWPW-190803/plan.md specs/MWPW-190803/research.md specs/MWPW-190803/spec.md specs/MWPW-190803/tasks.md
```

Only the first two were deleted. The `!` command seems to have been split across lines and only partially executed. Try this as one line:

```
! git rm --cached specs/MWPW-190803/contracts/settings-transformer.md specs/MWPW-190803/data-model.md specs/MWPW-190803/plan.md specs/MWPW-190803/research.md specs/MWPW-190803/spec.md specs/MWPW-190803/tasks.md
```

Done. Here's what was completed:

- **Merged main** into MWPW-190803 (3 commits from main)
- **Resolved dist conflicts** — rebuilt `web-components/dist/mas.js` and `merch-card.js` (all 51 tests pass)
- **Added `/specs/` and `.specify/`** to `.gitignore` and untracked 8 spec files from git
- **Restored** your MWPW-190918 working state
Done. PR #705 is conflict-free and spec files are removed from the diff. Back on MWPW-190918.
